objective: Rerun activity-backed power with exact hashed structural FakeRAM pin activity sidecars, without heuristic activity, fabricated power, or gate relaxation.

decoder_contract.decode_score_multivalue_cluster_activity: Audit the shared-score multivalue cluster with activity-backed power evidence after merged equivalence and PNR. Keep VCD/ODB/SPEF evaluator-local, commit only repo-portable JSON/MD artifacts, preserve the FakeRAM proxy qualification, and reject vectorless power as a substitute for annotated power or token-energy claims.
Promotion requires explicit annotation coverage, declared clock assumptions, macro activity attribution, and finite power-gate accounting.

evaluation_record.title: Activity-backed power gate for the shared-score multivalue decode cluster
evaluation_record.primary_question: Does the shared-score multivalue cluster remain physically interesting once evaluator-local activity evidence replaces the current vectorless-power placeholder?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: Promotion requires direct VCD roots, exact structural FakeRAM sidecar coverage, post-propagation coverage, transferred macro active coverage, exact clock, and finite positive power.

remaining_abstractions: FakeRAM area and power use Nangate45 proxy LEF/Liberty views, not SRAM compiler signoff.
Value-memory, NoC, HBM/DRAM, command-distribution, and clock-tree composition outside the cluster are not included.
RTL VCD is mapped to the routed netlist; each candidate records and gates direct annotation coverage.
Score multiplier and shift derivation remain external to the cluster boundary.
